---
description: "Add or update an AdvPort experience entry"
argument-hint: "Describe the project entry change"
agent: "agent"
---

Use the AdvPort experience-entry guidance to add or revise an experience project.

Requirements:

- update the centralized experience data model first
- keep localized copy in sync across locale catalogs
- preserve card/gallery/modal data flow
- preserve accessibility and focus behavior if interaction code changes
